Our Philosophy

Where design
meets soul

HOUSE OF INTERIORS is a full-service interior design and fit-out studio rooted in Delhi NCR. We believe extraordinary spaces are born at the intersection of vision, craft, and precision — not from templates, but from listening deeply to how you live and work.

From conceptual ideation to final handover, our multidisciplinary team manages every layer of transformation — structural, aesthetic, functional — under one roof. Whether a luxury residence, corporate HQ, or bespoke furniture commission, we bring the same reverence for detail to every brief.

HOUSE OF INTERIORS
What We Do

Our Core Services

Four disciplines, one vision — delivering spaces that are as functional as they are unforgettable across Delhi NCR.
01
Interior Designing
Comprehensive spatial design — mood boarding, material curation, and detailed working drawings. Every element calibrated for beauty and function.
02
Turnkey Projects
End-to-end execution — civil, MEP, joinery, finishes, and handover. One point of accountability, transparent timelines, zero compromise.
03
Modular Furniture
Factory-precision modular systems for kitchens, wardrobes, and workstations. Engineered for longevity, finished for elegance.
04
Soft Furnishing
Drapes, upholstery, rugs, and textiles — the tactile layer that transforms a space from designed to lived-in. Sourced globally, curated locally.
How We Work

Our Process

01
Discovery
Understanding your vision, lifestyle, and aspirations through in-depth consultation.
02
Concept
Moodboards, spatial layouts, and material palettes into a cohesive design story.
03
Design
Working drawings, 3D visualisations, BOQ preparation and vendor shortlisting.
04
Execution
On-site supervision, quality checks, and milestone-based progress tracking.
05
Handover
Snag-free delivery, styling, and post-completion support for seamless move-in.

Why Choose Us

Designed
to last

We don't chase trends — we build timeless environments. Our studio combines senior design expertise with artisan craftsmanship, ensuring every project exceeds what was imagined.

Begin Your Journey →
Single-Studio Ownership
Senior designer leads your project from first sketch to final handover — no handoffs, no dilution.
Precision Timelines
We treat your time as seriously as your taste. Milestone-backed schedules with real accountability.
Material Integrity
Verified suppliers, sustainable sourcing, and transparent pricing. No hidden markups, ever.
Post-Delivery Care
Comprehensive warranties and a dedicated after-care team for total peace of mind.
Client Words
"HOUSE OF INTERIORS turned our blank floor plate into a workspace our entire team loves. The attention to every detail — from lighting zones to custom joinery — was extraordinary."
Rahul Mehra
Founder, Meridian Ventures · Gurugram
